onboarding.select_language_subtitle: Pick the language you want the app to use. You can change this later in settings.

habits.empty_state: You haven't added any habits yet. Take the first step today.

notifications.reminder_daily: No excuses. Only action. Do what today requires.
notifications.streak_lost: The streak is broken. A strong person starts again — no one does it for you.
notifications.streak_milestone: {{count}}-day streak. This isn't luck — it's the result of discipline.
notifications.motivation_generic: Who you become is decided by your daily choices. Choose again — today.

subscription.free_limit_reached: The Free plan allows up to 3 habits. Upgrade to Dark Elite (PRO) to remove the limit.
